title: DevSecOps Engineer
description:
Job Title

DevSecOps Engineer

Job Description

We are seeking an experienced DevSecOps Engineer to join our team and play a pivotal role in setting up and managing cloud security processes and automation within a government environment. The successful candidate will work closely with development and operations teams to ensure secure, efficient, and scalable cloud infrastructure.

Key Responsibilities

  • Design, implement, and maintain cloud-based security processes, policies, and frameworks

  • Automate cloud operations to improve efficiency, scalability, and security

  • Write and maintain Terraform scripts for cloud infrastructure management, including:

    • Updating IP addresses

    • Modifying API Gateway WAF rules

    • Managing Route 53 configurations

  • Ensure cloud infrastructure is continuously secured and compliant with applicable standards

  • Collaborate with development teams to implement secure CI/CD pipelines

  • Monitor and audit cloud resources to ensure adherence to security best practices

  • Implement and manage cloud security tools, including AWS security services and third-party solutions

  • Perform regular reviews and updates of security policies to address emerging threats

Requirements

  • Proven experience in DevSecOps and cloud security

  • Hands-on experience in setting up and implementing cloud DevSecOps processes and policies

  • Strong knowledge of AWS cloud services, including AWS CLI

  • Proficiency in writing Terraform scripts for cloud resource automation and management

  • Experience automating cloud operations such as IP updates, API Gateway WAF rules, and Route 53 configurations

  • Solid understanding of security best practices, cloud compliance, and risk management

  • Strong troubleshooting and problem-solving skills

Preferred Qualifications (Nice to Have)

  • Experience working with government systems and familiarity with IM8 compliance standards

  • Relevant certifications such as:

    • AWS Certified Security – Specialty

    • AWS Certified Solutions Architect

    • DevSecOps-related certifications

  • Familiarity with tools such as Docker, Kubernetes, and CI/CD frameworks

Personal Attributes

  • Strong communication and collaboration skills

  • Ability to work independently and within a team environment

  • High attention to detail with a proactive problem-solving mindset

    We regret to inform that only shortlisted candidates will be notified. Please note that your response to this advertisement will constitute informed consent to the collection, use, and/or disclosure of personal data by Outsourcego, its affiliates and, where necessary, to relevant third parties, for purposes such as job application processing, career advisory, research, and other administrative purposes, in compliance with the relevant provisions of the Privacy Policy
